queries.question: List all baseball teams and basketball teams playing for USA.
queries.sql:
SELECT sports_team.name 
FROM sports_team
WHERE (sports_team.sport = "Baseball Team" OR sports_team.sport = "Basketball Team") AND sports_team.country = "USA"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?sports_team a :sports_team .
  ?sports_team p:name ?name .
  ?sports_team p:sport ?sport_w .
  ?sports_team p:sport ?sport_w2 .
  ?sports_team p:country ?country_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?sport_w) = "Baseball Team" || STR(?sport_w2) = "Basketball Team")) && STR(?country_w) = "USA"))
}

queries.sql:

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?sports_team a :sports_team .
  ?sports_team p:name ?name .
  ?sports_team p:sport ?sport_w .
